acceptance_targets: [chapter_06_award_001] Pass if a reader finishing snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:269-395 comes away with Martha/Owen rupture and the ward scar as the active end-state, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:389-391 no longer supply a clearly directional new route. Fail if the final image still functions mainly as a map clue for the next chapter.

[chapter_06_craft_001] Pass if, by the end of snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:121-141, a careful reader can state why the first glancing blow happens and what Owen has already done to cause it. Fail if the slap at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:121-123 still reads as unexplained luck until later exposition.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if a reader finishing snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:269-395 comes away with Martha/Owen rupture and the ward scar as the active end-state, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:389-391 no longer supply a clearly directional new route. Fail if the final image still functions mainly as a map clue for the next chapter.
findings.problem: After Martha finally sees Owen alter the punishment, the chapter spends its closing movement on ward verification and route-teasing rather than letting the human fracture stay dominant. The exit lands as sequel setup more than as the emotional wound this scene earns, and it partially pre-spends the cleaner route-revelation the boundary pack reserves for chapter 7.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:269-285 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:287-391 so the post-punishment pressure stays centered on Owen's social and moral consequence. Keep the ward aftermath in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:287-385, but either defer the route-like under-drawing now in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:389-391 to chapter 7 or reduce it to unreadable reaction rather than a legible next destination.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if, by the end of snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:121-141, a careful reader can state why the first glancing blow happens and what Owen has already done to cause it. Fail if the slap at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:121-123 still reads as unexplained luck until later exposition.
findings.problem: The amendment's activation is locally muddy at the chapter's most important causal turn. Owen inscribes the bench at line 83, Martha's slap already mislands at line 123, the hidden line only 'goes warm' at line 125, and Owen does not visibly take up wand and phrase until lines 135-137. That sequence leaves the first deflection reading as halfway between deliberate intervention, automatic spillover, and lucky authorial timing.
findings.rewrite_direction: Clarify the trigger chain across snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:83-141. Either show in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:121-127 that the prepared stroke auto-primes before Amycus hits her, or delay the first altered contact until after Owen's conscious activation in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:135-137. The reader should know whether the bench line alone is enough, whether the wand phrase is required, or how the two interact.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Preserve productive dialogue roughness; do not clean living speech into balanced thesis statements.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the premise's sharpest contradiction: school-year comedy, adolescent awkwardness, punitive cruelty, and cosmic dread may coexist in the same novel without canceling each other. When a scene offers a cleaner version and a truer version, choose the truer one unless the character is actively refusing perception on the page.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If pain, cruelty, fear, or moral ugliness would leave a bodily or environmental trace, render that trace instead of summarizing it into tasteful haze.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High. Contractions are the spoken norm for most characters; fuller forms are reserved for Snape, ritual language, or deliberate emphasis.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate scene density, dialogue load, and movement mode aggressively: confrontation against quiet meals, subterranean revelation against corridor farce, ritual compression against spring drift, so no consecutive chapters feel built from the same emotional or structural template.
prose_style_profile.diction: British boarding-school realism under wartime pressure, with speculative vocabulary introduced only when Owen's attention earns it.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third limited through Owen, with only brief sensory widenings that he could plausibly notice in the moment.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate analytic accumulation with blunt corporeal sentences. Quiet chapters should breathe; punishment and ritual chapters should tighten without clipping grammar.
